title: Figure 3 in Depth distribution of plant-parasitic nematodes on bentgrass golf greens in Missouri and Indiana
author: McCurdy, Asa L.

description: Figure 3: PCR results using Hoplolaimus-specific and H. stephanus, H. columbus and H. galeatus-specific primers.
